metadata.description: A collection of Claude skills for Java and Spring Boot development

plugins.name: java-code-standards
plugins.description: General Java coding standards: builder pattern, modern Java features, prohibited libraries

plugins.name: java-package-structure
plugins.description: Package by feature structure and DTO placement rules

plugins.name: java-testing-standards
plugins.description: Testing standards: JUnit 5, AssertJ, Testcontainers, assertion style

plugins.name: spring-code-standards
plugins.description: Spring Boot standards: DI, RestClient, JdbcClient, configuration, SQLite, HTTP testing

plugins.name: documentation-standards
plugins.description: Documentation standards for README.md and CLAUDE.md
